name: John Doe
history: Works in an educational setting with children who have learning disabilities. Describes being pampered by parents and having minimal consequences earlier in life. Ongoing conflicts with authority figures.
intermediate_belief: I must be perfect in my work to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't do things perfectly, I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Avoids confronting authority and procrastinates on tasks perceived as difficult.
situation: Proposed a new teaching method that was rejected by school leadership. Does not confront leadership directly about the decision.
auto_thought: I can't do anything right, and I'll never be able to catch up.
behavior: Procrastinates on tasks and avoids confrontation.
